# Evidence

- Anthropic, "Effective context engineering for AI agents": retrieve context just in time instead of pre-loading everything.
- Aider repo map: a small graph-ranked map of signatures is often enough to navigate a repo without loading full files.
- Drew Breunig, "How Long Contexts Fail": extra tools and extra context increase confusion even when the prompt still fits.

Full source list: [shared references](../../REFERENCES.md)
